import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let m: Map<String, Int> = {"one": 1, "two": 2, "three": 3}
  let raw = io.read_line()
  match raw
  when None
    print("missing")
  when Some(key)
    let k = string.trim(key)
    match m.get(k)
    when Some(n)
      print("value=#{n}")
    when None
      print("missing")
    end
  end
end
